title: onobrychis nummularia
intro: Onobrychis nummularia, also known as silver treacle or silver melilot, is a plant species in the pea family. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm inflammation and soothe digestive issues. The plant contains isoflavones and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Onobrychis nummularia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
